Name: The Chapin School
City: Upper East Side, New York, US
About: I encourage you to explore its many pages to learn more about a Chapin education, and how our students discover within themselves the power to lead lives of curiosity, empathy and joy. As you explore our website's pages, you will find that Chapin is a school where young women blossom, and to which they often return.
Philosophy: Since our founding in 1901, Chapin has been steadfast in its commitment to girls' education, academic excellence, intellectual courage, and social and civic responsibility.
Outcomes: The Chapin School boasts a strong record of Ivy League placements, with graduates attending top universities such as Harvard, Yale, and Princeton. Alumnae have excelled in diverse fields, including business, arts, and public service, reflecting the school's commitment to academic excellence and leadership.
Admissions: Dianne Williams (K-5) Director of Admissions 212-570-4953 dwilliams@chapin.edu Karen Lee (Cl. 6-12) Director of Admissions & Financial Aid for Applicant Families 212-570-4940 kalee@chapin.edu Kate Knight (Cl.
Quote: I loved my time at Chapin. The teachers were fantastic! I learned writing and critical analysis skills that I use every single day. I also had such wonderful friends there.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Chapin’s Music Department is committed to the mission of fostering joyful musicianship in all our students. We know that every individual is born with inherent musicality, and we strive to foster this fundamental quality and to encourage a lifelong engagement with and love of music.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Through arts integration, each student’s connections to curricular concepts is deepened and diversified. Students are encouraged to use art class as an opportunity for exploration, discovery, collaboration and self-expression.
Performance.Academic Integration: Class 3 students celebrates the culmination of an immersive unit in “Triple S,” a once-a-cycle extension of the Spanish and Social Studies curriculum.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Chapin Drama aims to foster artistic expression and community amongst all students. We value exposure to all aspects of theatrical production, including performance, technical theatre, directing and playwriting.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student choreography and exploration is central to our work. We encourage students to apply critical thinking and problem solving to our dance practice, understand how the connections between dance and other art forms can inform the creative process, and exchange feedback as a tool for reflection and growth.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: The Chapin School's graduates have an impressive Ivy League acceptance rate, with many students matriculating to prestigious institutions like Columbia and Dartmouth. Notable alumnae include Vera Wang and Jacqueline Kennedy Onassis, showcasing the school's influence in diverse fields.
